title: Triad Ask: Simultaneous Q, 정반합 Debate, Tool Loop, Agent Mode
desc: Usage patterns for the 3-AI triad system: parallel questioning, thesis-antithesis-synthesis debate, AppBot tool-call loop, and full agent mode. Each pattern has different cost/depth tradeoffs.
steps: 1. [SIMULTANEOUS Q] wkappbot ask triad "<question>" -- all 3 AIs (Gemini/GPT/Claude) answer in parallel on the same Slack thread. Best for: broad gap analysis, design review, architectural decisions. Share full context (skill content, code snippets, version info) in the question for best results. TIP: Include 'this is a C# project, not Python' to prevent Gemini tool-call headscratch on .py files.
author: claude
